name: fastware
help: fastware framework CLI: run a file-driven Vite + backend dev environment

dev.name: dev
dev.help: Run and manage the file-driven development environment

run.name: run
run.help: Start the dev environment (pre-spawn gates, aux services, Vite + backend) from the nearest [tool.fastware.dev] config

flags.name: daemon
flags.help: Detach and run the dev environment in the background, registering it in the instance registry (query with 'dev status', stop with 'dev stop'). Default runs in the foreground and blocks until Ctrl+C.

flags.name: grace
flags.help: Seconds to wait for a component to stop gracefully before SIGKILL.

status.name: status
status.help: List running dev environments registered in the instance registry

stop.name: stop
stop.help: Stop running dev environments gracefully (then SIGKILL after the grace period)

flags.name: grace
flags.help: Seconds to wait for a dev environment to stop gracefully before SIGKILL.
